justification: All pass criteria met: scope mismatch explicitly identified with Bird's exact quote about faceted filtering being out of scope vs MJ's inclusion of category/price/brand filters. Both conflicting positions attributed to their respective agents. Escalation structured for Coach K resolution (not directed at Shaq). No handoff brief produced containing faceted filtering — output is an escalation, not a brief. In-scope content (keyword AND logic, BM25 relevance sorting) correctly noted as agreed-upon. Escalation presents concrete options including confirming scope for this release.

observations.text: Bird's exact scope language quoted: 'Faceted filtering (by category, price range, brand) is explicitly out of scope for this release'
MJ's conflicting filters enumerated specifically: category (term filter), price_min/price_max (range filter), brand (term filter)
Escalation presents three well-reasoned options rather than silently resolving the conflict
Recommendation correctly defers to Bird as domain authority rather than siding with MJ's architecture
No brief produced — Magic correctly blocked on the contradiction instead of shipping a compromised handoff
Low confidence (35) is appropriate given the unresolved scope conflict
